title: Cracking buffer, 4X (10 mL)
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"1ujui","text":"For use in Polyacrylamide Gel System For Electrophoresis Of Proteins.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":11,"length":57}],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"link","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"1B6AFD898F7D4B2B922EFD585587A65F","url":"https://www.protocols.io/view/Polyacrylamide-Gel-System-For-Electrophoresis-Of-P-ep7bdrn"}}}}
steps: Combine: %s %s 5.0 mL of 20% SDS 2.0 mL of 100% Glycerol 1.0 mL of 1% Bromophenolblue 2.0 ml of 4X stacking gel buffer 0.5 mL of 500 mM DTT
For solid samples, dilute the cracking buffer to 1X concentration and use to suspend samples. Boil samples for 10 minutes before loading onto gel.
For aqueous samples, add 1.0 µL of cracking buffer per 3.0 µL of sample and boil samples for 10 minutes before loading onto gel.
creator: Irina Agarkova
